context_text: " You people with hearts," he said, "have something to guide you, and need never do wrong; but I have no heart, and so I must be very careful.
normalized_context_text: " You people with hearts," he said, "have something to guide you, and need never do wrong; but I have no heart, and so I must be very careful.

subject: You people with hearts
